title: Better Frost Walker
body:
# Better Frost Walker
Makes enchantment Frost Walker better.

# Features
- Sprint-Jumping - Allows you to sprint-jump with Frost Walker.
- Horse Armor - Allows you to put Frost Walker on horse armor using an anvil.

# Preview
![Sprint-Jump](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pzF0CleI/images/d6d4706f957c38bca32d65254d06af16e5a1e518.gif)
![Horse Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pzF0CleI/images/11106a6ef0b555bf116008c2ade9e775835fc1b5.gif)
